data.html:
// Gets any parameters sent along with the address of the page
const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);

// Get the value of the "l" parameter or set default value to "en"
const defaultlanguage = params.has('l') ? params.get('l') : 'en';

$(document).ready(function() {
	// AJAX request to fetch the JSON file
	$.getJSON('languages.json', function(data) {
		// Access the JSON content
		languages = data;
		selectedLanguage = defaultlanguage;
		if (defaultlanguage != 'en'){
			$("#AvailableLanguages").hide();
		}
		updateContent();
	});
});

function ShowLanguages() {
	GetListOfLanguages(93);
	$("#LanguageTitle").html("Select Language");
	$("#LanguageDropDown").show();
}

function updateContent() {
	$("#ProgramTitle").html(languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramTitle);
	$("#LabDirections").html(languages[selectedLanguage].LabDirections);
	$("#BeginButton").html(languages[selectedLanguage].BeginButton);
	$("#AnswerTitle").html(languages[selectedLanguage].AnswerTitle);
	$("#DirectionsforSub").html(languages[selectedLanguage].DirectionsforSub);
	$("#SystemMessage").html(languages[selectedLanguage].SystemMessage);
	$("#SubmitButton").html(languages[selectedLanguage].SubmitButton);
	$("#WordName").html(languages[selectedLanguage].WordName);
	$("#Q1").html(languages[selectedLanguage].Q1);
	$("#Q2").html(languages[selectedLanguage].Q2);
}

// Function triggered by onchange event
function SwitchLanguage() {
	selectedLanguage = $("#LanguageUsed").val();
	updateContent();
}

function GetListOfLanguages(x){
	$.get('/Physics/sitewide/listoflanguages.php', {ProgramID: x}, function(response) {
	  $('#LanguageDropDown').html(response);
	});
}

function initialize(){
	theCanvas = $("#CanvasOne")[0];
	ctx = theCanvas.getContext("2d");
	StartRoadY = 200;
	RoadWidth = 200;
	CarY = StartRoadY + 0.65*RoadWidth;
	CarX = 50;
	StartLineX = 50;
	OriginalStartLineX = StartLineX;
	lengthofcar = 30;
	widthofcar = 10;
	offsetvalue = 10;
	carcolor = "#bc00ff";
	FinalColor = "#FFFFFF";
	Moving = "no";
	GenerateProblem();
}

function GenerateProblem() {
	StartingSpeed = Math.floor(Math.random()*170+170)/10;
	MassOfCar = Math.floor(Math.random()*1000+500);
	CoefficientOfFriction = Math.floor(Math.random()*50+25)/100;

}

function LoadIt(){
	StudentName = $("#StudentName").val();
	if (StudentName == ''){
		$("#LabDirections").html(languages[selectedLanguage].ErrorWithLabDirections);
	}
	else{
		$("#LabSection").show();
		$("#OverviewSection").hide();
		d = new Date();
		nowtime = d.getTime();
		drawingpart();
	}
}

function StartMotion(){
	ForceGravity = MassOfCar*9.8;
	ForceNormal = ForceGravity;
	ForceFriction = CoefficientOfFriction*ForceNormal;
	Acceleration = ForceFriction/MassOfCar;
	Moving = "yes";
	d = new Date();
	starttime = d.getTime();
	StartItMoving = setInterval(drawingpart, 20);
	$("#SpaceForAnswer").hide();
}

function drawingpart(){
	ctx.fillStyle = FinalColor;
	ctx.fillRect(0,0,925,600);
	if (Moving == "yes"){
		d = new Date();
		nowtime = d.getTime();
		elapsedtime = (nowtime-starttime)/1000;
		DistanceTraveled = StartingSpeed*elapsedtime - 0.5*Acceleration*Math.pow(elapsedtime, 2.0);
		NewSpeed = StartingSpeed - Acceleration*elapsedtime;
		CarX = 50 + DistanceTraveled*20;
		if (CarX > 500){
			Fraction = (700 - CarX)
			LinesMove = CarX - 500;
			CarX = 500;
			StartLineX = OriginalStartLineX - LinesMove;
		}
		if (NewSpeed <= 0){
			Moving = "done";
			SubmitForm();
		}
	}
	DrawCar(450, StartRoadY - 50);
	ctx.lineWidth = 1;
	ctx.strokeStyle = "#000000";
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.moveTo(450, StartRoadY - 50);
	ctx.lineTo(450 + 50, StartRoadY - 50);
	ctx.moveTo(450 + 45, StartRoadY - 45);
	ctx.lineTo(450 + 50, StartRoadY - 50);
	ctx.lineTo(450 + 45, StartRoadY - 55);
	ctx.stroke();
	WriteText(450 + 60, StartRoadY - 45, "v = " + StartingSpeed.toFixed(1) + " m/s", 18, "#000000", 0);
	WriteText(450 - lengthofcar - 35, StartRoadY - 45, "µ = " + CoefficientOfFriction.toFixed(2), 18, "#009900", 1.0);
	WriteText(450 - 0.5*lengthofcar, StartRoadY - 20, "m = " + MassOfCar.toFixed(0) + " kg", 18, "#000099", 0.5);
	DrawRoad();
	DrawStartLine(StartLineX, StartRoadY + 0.2*RoadWidth, 20, 0.6*RoadWidth);
	DrawMeterLines(StartLineX, StartRoadY + 0.2*RoadWidth, 2, 0.6*RoadWidth);
	DrawCar(CarX, CarY);
}

function DrawMeterLines(x, y, w, h){
	ctx.lineWidth = w;
	ctx.strokeStyle = "#FFFFFF";
	for (i = 1; i < 40; i++){
		ctx.beginPath();
		ctx.moveTo(x + i*200, y);
		ctx.lineTo(x + i*200, y + h);
		ctx.stroke();
		temptext = i*10;
		WriteText(x + i*200, y - 10, temptext.toFixed(0) + " m", 14, "#FFFFFF", 0.5);
	}

}

function DrawStartLine(x, y, w, h){
	DrawRectangle(x, y, w, h, 0, "#CCCCCC", "#EEEEEE", 2);
	ctx.save();
	ctx.translate(x + 0.5*w, y + 0.5*h);
	ctx.rotate(0.5*Math.PI);
	WriteText(0, 8, "STOP", 22, "#000000", 0.5);
	ctx.restore();

}

function DrawRoad(){
	ctx.fillStyle = "#28b84b";
	ctx.fillRect(-10, StartRoadY, 950, RoadWidth);

	ctx.fillStyle = "#666666";
	ctx.fillRect(-10, StartRoadY + 0.2*RoadWidth, 950, 0.6*RoadWidth);

	ctx.lineWidth = 4;
	ctx.strokeStyle = "#fff132";
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.moveTo(-10, StartRoadY + 0.48*RoadWidth);
	ctx.lineTo(950, StartRoadY + 0.48*RoadWidth);

	ctx.moveTo(-10, StartRoadY + 0.52*RoadWidth);
	ctx.lineTo(950, StartRoadY + 0.52*RoadWidth);
	ctx.stroke();
}

function DrawCar(x, y){

	ctx.fillStyle="#bc00ff";

	/* Body */
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.arc(x - widthofcar/3, y, widthofcar/3, 0.5*Math.PI, 1.5*Math.PI, true);
	ctx.lineTo(x - 0.75*lengthofcar, y - widthofcar/2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar, y - widthofcar/2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar, y + widthofcar/2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - 0.75*lengthofcar, y + widthofcar/2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - widthofcar/3, y + widthofcar/3);
	ctx.closePath();
	ctx.fill();

	/* Spoiler */
	ctx.fillStyle="#a500ff";
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.moveTo(x - lengthofcar-3, y - 2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar+2, y - 2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar+2, y - widthofcar/2-2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar+7, y - widthofcar/2-4);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar+7, y + widthofcar/2+4);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar+2, y + widthofcar/2+2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar+2, y + 2);
	ctx.lineTo(x - lengthofcar-3, y + 2);
	ctx.closePath();
	ctx.fill();

	/* BackTires */
	ctx.fillStyle="#8d8d8d";
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.8*lengthofcar,y - widthofcar/2-2,3,2);
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.8*lengthofcar,y + widthofcar/2,3,2);
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.8*lengthofcar-4,y - widthofcar/2-6,10,4);
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.8*lengthofcar-4,y + widthofcar/2+2,10,4);

	/* Tires */
	ctx.fillStyle="#8d8d8d";
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.1*lengthofcar,y - 4,1,1);
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.1*lengthofcar,y + 3,1,1);
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.1*lengthofcar-2,y - 6,5,2);
	ctx.fillRect(x - 0.1*lengthofcar-2,y + 4,5,2);


	/* Person */
	ctx.fillStyle="#000000";
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.arc(x - 0.7*lengthofcar, y, 3, 0, 2*Math.PI);
	ctx.closePath();
	ctx.fill();

	ctx.fillStyle="#7efbff";
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.arc(x - 0.7*lengthofcar+1, y, 2, 0, 2*Math.PI);
	ctx.closePath();
	ctx.fill();

	ctx.lineWidth = 1;
	ctx.strokeStyle = "#2519ff";
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.moveTo(x - 0.7*lengthofcar-1, y);
	ctx.lineTo(x - 0.7*lengthofcar+3, y);
	ctx.stroke();

	ctx.font="6px Arial";
	ctx.fillStyle="#000000";
	temptext = "1022";
	metrics = ctx.measureText(temptext);
	textWidth = metrics.width;
	xposition = x - 0.3*lengthofcar - textWidth/2;
	ctx.fillText(temptext,xposition, y + 2);
}

function SubmitForm(){
	TimeOfAcceleration = StartingSpeed/Acceleration;
	DistanceCovered = (StartingSpeed)/2*TimeOfAcceleration;
	Answer1 = TimeOfAcceleration;
	Answer2 = DistanceCovered;
	Response1 = $("#A1").val();
	Response2 = $("#A2").val();
	if (LanguageArray.indexOf(selectedLanguage)>-1){
		Response1 = Response1.replace(/,/g, '.');
		Response2 = Response2.replace(/,/g, '.');
	}
	$("#SpaceForAnswer").hide();
	$("#SystemMessage").hide();
	Error1 = Math.abs(Answer1 - Response1)/Answer1*100;
	Error2 = Math.abs(Answer2 - Response2)/Answer2*100;

	if (Error1 < 3 && Error2 < 3){
		FinalErrorMessage = languages[selectedLanguage].FinalErrorMessage.Correct;
		FinalColor = "#EEFFEE";
	}
	else{
		FinalErrorMessage = languages[selectedLanguage].FinalErrorMessage.Wrong;
		FinalColor = "#FFEEEE";
	}
	StartRoadY = 400;
	CarY = StartRoadY + 0.65*RoadWidth;
	clearInterval(StartItMoving);
	drawingpart();
	FinalMessages();

}


function FinalMessages(){
	TextSeparation = 40;
	TextLocation = 50;
	TextLocationX = 450;
	BigText = 24;
	MediumText = 18;
	SmallText = 14;

	TempText = StudentName + " (" + languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramTitle + ")";
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, BigText, "#990000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = FinalErrorMessage;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].Q1;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#990000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.Predicted + " = " + Response1 + ", " + languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.True + " = " + Answer1.toPrecision(3);
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].Q2;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#990000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.Predicted + " = " + Response2 + ", " + languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.True + " = " + Answer2.toPrecision(3);
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	d = new Date();
	nowtime = d.getTime();
	WriteText(600,575,nowtime,12,"#990000",0);

}
